metadata.thoughts:
**Converting event details**

I need to convert the time frame "Dalle ore 3 di domenica 16 giugno alle ore 2 di lunedì 17 giugno," which translates to 03:00 on Sunday, June 16, to 02:00 on Monday, June 17, 2024.  The dates will be 2024-06-16 03:00:00 to 2024-06-17 02:00:00.  We should use a 24-hour format. The article discusses impacts on the Lombardy train services, like regional and suburban lines. For location coding, it seems like it needs to be REGIONAL with location codes ["03"].
